creator: wgodfrey@ena.com
text:
From install DVD, after installing system and trying to boot it locks up right after:

Pci1. Pci bus on pcib7

The LCD on the PowerEdge reports:
E1410 cpu1 ierr.  E1410. Cpu2. Ierr

System works fine with 7.0-RELEASE amd 64

it is a Dell PowerEdge 2950-iii with 2x4core Intel processors and 8GB RAM.  It has a Perc RAID controller and the system is booting from a RAID 1 of 2x76GB SATA disks.

Fix: 

unknown
How-To-Repeat: try to install on PE2950 and boot for the 1st time
